definitions.en: A phrase used to express uncertainty or a guess about something.
definitions.vi: Từ dùng để diễn tả sự phỏng đoán hoặc không chắc chắn về một điều gì đó.

example.en: It seems like it will rain today.
example.vi: Hình như hôm nay trời sẽ mưa.

exampleSentencesTranslated: It seems it will rain today so I brought an umbrella.
It seems you forgot your keys when you left the house.
It seems I saw him at the coffee shop this morning.
notes_md:
**Hình như** = *it seems like / I think maybe…* (but you’re not sure). It shows uncertainty based on a feeling or guess.

It usually goes at the **beginning of a sentence** to soften what you say. You’re not confirming, just sensing or suspecting something.


Close synonym: **có vẻ (như)** – a bit more “it appears that,” sometimes slightly more based on visible evidence.

translation.en: He seems to have forgotten the homework.

content.sentence: Cậu ấy ___ đã quên bài tập.

notes:
Hình như = it seems like / I think maybe… (but you’re not sure). It shows uncertainty based on a feeling or guess.

It usually goes at the beginning of a sentence to soften what you say. You’re not confirming, just sensing or suspecting something.

Close synonym: có vẻ (như) – a bit more “it appears that,” sometimes slightly more based on visible evidence.
exampleSentences: Hình như hôm nay trời sẽ mưa nên anh mang theo ô.
Chị hình như quên mang chìa khóa khi ra khỏi nhà.
Hình như em thấy bạn ấy ở quán cà phê sáng nay.

translation.en: She seems not to come to the meeting.

content.sentence: Cô ấy ___ không đến buổi họp.
